## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to discuss content strategy and SEO approach for Imubit's website](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift focus to top-of-funnel content using high-volume keywords while maintaining brand integrity](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Create separate "Articles" section distinct from "Blog" for SEO-driven long-form content](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Develop linkable thought leadership piece on industrial process optimization trends/predictions](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Optimize existing content and expand into new vertical markets beyond oil & gas refining](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [GrowthX creating top-of-funnel content to drive traffic; Imubit team concerned about brand dilution](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Agreed to separate "Articles" (SEO-focused) from "Blog" (domain expert short-form content)](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Will create two versions of articles - one mentioning Imubit, one without - to find right balance](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [Focus on "industrial AI" as key term to own, but "industrial process optimization" closer to solution](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)

### Website Structure for SEO

  - [Need static URL for filtered article/blog pages (e.g. /articles, /blog)](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Cross-link articles with other relevant content (guides, blogs) for SEO benefit](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Ensure new content discoverable via site navigation and sitemap](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)

### Expanding Market Focus

  - [Shift from oil & gas refining to broader "industrial processing" vertical initially](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=2214.0)
  - [Gradually add content for sub-verticals (petrochemical, mining, etc.) to expand reach](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=2228.0)
  - [Maintain "industrial" as top-level vertical to stay horizontal for now](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=2232.0)

### Thought Leadership Content

  - [Develop "State of Industrial Process Optimization" report with stats, predictions, client data](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=2609.0)
  - [Update annually to build authority and attract backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=2699.0)
  - [Consider having subject matter expert (vs. CEO) provide commentary for faster turnaround](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=2629.0)

### SEO and AI Search Considerations

  - [Long-form content still important for SEO despite AI search growth](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [AI search allows for longer, more contextual queries](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=2096.0)
  - [Rankings in AI overviews may differ from traditional search results](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=2860.0)
  - [Image optimization important as Imubit image appearing prominently for some queries](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=2804.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mariana to create revised versions of initial articles addressing feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=2532.0)
  - [Develop outline for "State of Industrial Process Optimization" report](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=2609.0)
  - [Add assignments for industry-specific content beyond oil & gas](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=3300.0)
  - [Explore thought leadership opportunities based on trending news topics](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=3180.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting with website team to discuss article/blog structure](https://fathom.video/share/Dz4pasgENgNwn2cWGnTwVNzdrx3ey3Rq?tab=summary&timestamp=2407.0)
